message:
test(e2e,manifest): add golden vector tests and update compliance harnesses

Add 5 new manifest golden vector tests: openai, llm-router, anthropic,
browser, microsoft365. Update stripe E2E with new operation names.
Replace vectordb E2E stub adapter with real connector delegation.
Update pool count assertions for stripe and notion (3 -> 4).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
